mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume (user_id, version, source, status, error_msg, raw_text, parsed_data, file_name, file_url, file_size, is_active) VALUES (#{userId}, #{version}, #{source}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{rawText}, #{parsedData}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{isActive})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resume WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE resume SET status = #{status}, error_msg = #{errorMsg} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resume SET parsed_data = #{parsedData}, status = 1, error_msg = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resume SET raw_text = #{rawText} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resume SET is_active = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE resume SET is_active = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resume SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, version, source, status, error_msg, raw_text, parsed_data, file_name, file_url, file_size, is_active, create_time, update_time FROM resume WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resume WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source = #{source}
